name: Romanian Deadlift (RDL)
setup: Barbell at hip height (from rack or pick up from floor)
Stand with feet hip-width, bar at front of thighs
execution: Hinge at hips, pushing butt back
Keep back neutral, bar close to thighs
Feel hamstring stretch as bar passes knees
Lower until you feel max hamstring stretch (or ~mid-shin)
Reverse by driving hips forward, squeezing glutes at top
common_mistakes: Knees bending too much (turns into squat)
Not going deep enough for hamstring stretch
cues: Push hips back like closing a drawer with your butt
Bar drags up your thighs on the way up
Feel the hamstring stretch, then squeeze glutes forward
